creator: zaa@zaa.pp.ru
text:
On Mon, Jan 21, 2008 at 12:28:04PM +0000, miwi@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [UPDATE] www/pecl-pecl_http to 1.6.0

Thank you for your efforts. I've checked the diff file and corrected it.
Below you will find updated version which adds support for usage of
libevent.

diff -urbN pecl-pecl_http.orig/Makefile pecl-pecl_http/Makefile
--- pecl-pecl_http.orig/Makefile	Fri Oct  5 04:14:37 2007
+++ pecl-pecl_http/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 12:56:44 2008
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pecl_http
-DISTVERSION=	1.5.5
+DISTVERSION=	1.6.0
 CATEGORIES=	www pear
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pecl.php.net/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pecl-
@@ -34,6 +34,8 @@
 .if defined(WITH_CURL)
 LIB_DEPENDS+=	curl.4:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-http-curl-requests=${LOCALBASE}
+LIB_DEPENDS+=	event:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libevent
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-http-curl-libevent=${LOCALBASE}
 .else
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--without-http-curl-requests
 .endif
diff -urbN pecl-pecl_http.orig/distinfo pecl-pecl_http/distinfo
--- pecl-pecl_http.orig/distinfo	Thu Sep  6 04:14:37 2007
+++ pecl-pecl_http/distinfo	Tue Jan 22 12:38:45 2008
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (PECL/pecl_http-1.5.5.tgz) = 69f8949ceb6ef0baf78c3e4725c7b6ec
-SHA256 (PECL/pecl_http-1.5.5.tgz) = d79110923195de0f6d10c527051341bc1a107a357fe3559053691c7331e5bb0c
-SIZE (PECL/pecl_http-1.5.5.tgz) = 167890
+MD5 (PECL/pecl_http-1.6.0.tgz) = 21ef481ae45db61591dd98a935a4dfce
+SHA256 (PECL/pecl_http-1.6.0.tgz) = 9a43f3f9f3ebd3ff706e5dcae2efba9b6f07167ab56c232c2839cb5b8c14c7e9
+SIZE (PECL/pecl_http-1.6.0.tgz) = 172432
